hero.subtitle: Whether you need to deliver a package, need a quick trip, or want to move your goods — Qaddam is here to get it done at the right time.

services.title: Everything You Need in One App
services.subtitle: Qaddam brings together delivery, transportation, and logistics in one easy-to-use platform.

items.title: Order Delivery
items.description: Deliver your packages, documents, or anything you need — fast and safely to the recipient's door.

items.title: Ride Trips
items.description: Book your ride with professional drivers available 24/7 throughout the week.

items.title: Business Shipping
items.description: Flexible logistics solutions for small and medium businesses with real-time tracking.

items.title: Express Delivery
items.description: Express service delivering within 30 minutes inside the city for your urgent priorities.

howItWorks.title: Simple • Fast • Reliable
howItWorks.subtitle: Just four steps separate you from ideal delivery

steps.title: Enter Your Destination
steps.description: Set your pickup and drop-off location easily on the map or type the address directly.

steps.title: Choose desired Vehicle
steps.description: Select the right vehicle for your needs: Bike, Sedan, Van, Truck and etc.

steps.title: Track in Real Time
steps.description: Monitor your driver moment by moment and communicate directly until your order arrives safely.

steps.title: Receive & Rate
steps.description: Receive your order and rate your experience to help us provide even better service next time.

driverGuide.title: How Delivering Works
driverGuide.subtitle: From accepting an order to getting paid — here's every step of a delivery on Qaddam

steps.title: Get a New Order
steps.description: Go online and instantly receive nearby delivery requests with pickup and drop-off details, distance, and estimated time.

steps.title: Negotiate & Accept
steps.description: Chat directly with the customer, agree on a fair price, and accept the offer to lock in the order.

steps.title: Start the Order
steps.description: Your booking is confirmed — head straight to the pickup location to collect the shipment.

steps.title: Head to Pickup
steps.description: Follow turn-by-turn navigation to reach the customer, then mark your arrival at the pickup point.

steps.title: Confirm Loading
steps.description: Take a photo confirming the shipment is loaded and secure, then start the delivery.

steps.title: Confirm Delivery
steps.description: Once you've delivered the shipment, upload a photo as proof and mark the order as delivered.

steps.title: Rate & Get Paid
steps.description: Rate your experience with the customer, collect your payment, and you're ready for the next order.

drivers.title: Turn Your Time Into Real Income
drivers.subtitle: Join thousands of drivers earning flexible income with Qaddam. You control your schedule and earnings.

perks.text: Daily earnings with daily and weekly bonuses
Flexible work hours that suit your schedule
Full insurance and protection on every trip
Simple, clear driver app without complexity

items.text: Outstanding service! The driver arrived in under 10 minutes and the delivery was very fast. I'll definitely keep using Qaddam for my orders.
items.name: Mohammed Al-Otaibi

items.text: Best delivery app I've tried! The real-time tracking is great and I always meet my company's delivery deadlines because of Qaddam.
items.name: Sara Al-Zahrani

items.text: As a driver at Qaddam, the earnings are excellent and the app is easy to use. Support is always available and responds quickly.
items.name: Faisal Al-Dosari

downloadPage.heading: Download the Qaddam App
downloadPage.subtitle: Scan the QR code or tap a button below to download the app on your device.

cta.title: Ready to Start with Qaddam?
cta.subtitle: Join more than 250,000 users who trust Qaddam daily across the Kingdom.

footer.description: The fastest delivery and transportation platform in Saudi Arabia. Connecting customers with thousands of professional drivers around the clock.

aboutUs.title: About us
aboutUs.heading: Trucking Made Simple
aboutUs.paragraph1: Founded in Saudi Arabia in 2025, Qaddam is an on-demand delivery platform built to empower communities by making logistics fast, simple, and affordable.
aboutUs.paragraph2: Driven by technology, we connect people, vehicles, and goods to move what matters and support local communities.

careers.title: Find your career at Qaddam
careers.heading: Career at Qaddam
careers.paragraph: Qaddam is redefining on-demand delivery through technology, empowering users to send and receive with speed and confidence.
